description: Powertech Technology Inc. (PTI) is a leading Taiwan-based OSAT (Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test) company specializing in memory packaging and testing. PTI is one of the world's largest independent DRAM and Flash memory packaging companies, with growing exposure to HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) advanced packaging.
products_services: HBM (High Bandwidth Memory) packaging and testing

market_data.source: Public filings, training data. PTI reports in NTD.

financial_highlights.revenue_trend: Strong recovery in 2024 driven by memory market rebound and HBM demand. Revenue grew 20-30% YoY in 2024.
financial_highlights.profitability: Operating margin improving from ~8-10% to ~12-15% with better product mix (higher HBM content).
financial_highlights.recent_developments: PTI has been expanding HBM packaging capacity aggressively. In 2024-2025, the company invested in new production lines for HBM3E packaging. Strategic partnership with SK Hynix for HBM packaging.

strengths: Dominant position in memory packaging (DRAM + Flash)
Early mover in HBM packaging with proven technology
Strong relationship with SK Hynix (primary HBM supplier)
Located in Taiwan with access to TSMC ecosystem
weaknesses: Heavy concentration on memory packaging (cyclical market)
Lower revenue scale vs. ASE/Amkor in overall OSAT
Limited presence in logic/advanced SoC packaging
opportunities: HBM demand exploding with AI GPU market (NVIDIA H100/H200/B100 all require HBM)
HBM3E and HBM4 requiring more advanced packaging, increasing ASPs
Potential to expand into logic advanced packaging
threats: SK Hynix and Samsung may vertically integrate HBM packaging
ASE/Amkor investing in memory packaging capabilities
Memory market cyclicality could impact demand

data_gaps: HBM capacity expansion timeline and capex figures
sources: Training data (publicly available financial reports and industry analysis)
collector_notes: PTI website accessible but limited content. Financial data sites blocked. Data compiled from training knowledge. PTI is a key HBM packaging play - recommend verifying latest capex and HBM revenue share.
